title: eryngium madrense
intro: Eryngium madrense, also known as Madren's Sea Holly, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Eryngium madrense include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. Eryngium madrense can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
